textPlain: Opened a few PICT files I threw at it.Looking for an Export… item but did not see that. I suppose one reason to open an old PICT file is to save it as a PNG or something that will be easier to open in the future.
I just opened a PICT file in Preview on Mac and it also offers PDF export. What's the advantage of using this app?
Given that PICT is a vector format at heart, what'd be ideal would be a conversion to SVG. At one point I had part of a tool written to do that, but it didn't handle text very well.
> What's the advantage of using this app?From the README:> Preview can only open a small subset of the files I have.
